Name: Source family identified
Meaning: General source category known, no specific verified item
Permitted Use: Do not use for factual manuscript claims

Name: Discovery source found
Meaning: Search result, article, secondary reference, or known report title

Name: Direct source page verified
Meaning: Official page or stable source page found
Permitted Use: Can cite existence of source, not detailed claim unless read

Name: PDF or stable primary source captured
Meaning: Source file captured or stable official document available

Name: Page-level extraction completed
Permitted Use: Can support draft notes with caution

Name: Claim-to-source mapping completed
Meaning: Each claim mapped to exact source/page/quote or finding

Name: Manuscript-ready
Meaning: Source, counter-evidence, wording, limitation, and citation are final
